title: ShieldAgent
mechanism: LTL rules extracted from policy docs, enforced via Markov Logic Network
gap_or_limitation: Degrades on hallucination-related risk

title: AgentSpec
mechanism: DSL: trigger -> predicate -> enforcement action
gap_or_limitation: Purely deterministic, no confidence conditioning

title: CaMeL
mechanism: P-LLM/Q-LLM separation + capability-tracking interpreter
gap_or_limitation: No graceful escalation when task requires trusting untrusted data

title: IsolateGPT
mechanism: Process isolation via permission-controlled hub
gap_or_limitation: Intra-app compromise unaddressed

title: VeriGuard
mechanism: Formally verified Python policies via Hoare triples (Nagini)
gap_or_limitation: Soundness depends on LLM-generated constraints capturing intent

title: AgentGuard
mechanism: Online MDP + PCTL probabilistic model checking
gap_or_limitation: Tracks behavioral frequency not epistemic state

title: ASB
mechanism: 4 attack types x 10 scenarios x 13 LLMs
gap_or_limitation: More capable = more vulnerable

title: RealSafe
mechanism: 12 LLMs x 14 scenarios, paired Risk/Helpfulness metric
gap_or_limitation: Confident progression through ambiguous instructions

title: FAIL-TaLMs
mechanism: Tool-augmented LMs under underspecified queries
gap_or_limitation: Awareness-to-action gap: 56% uncertainty awareness doesn't improve outcomes

title: MCIP
mechanism: CI-grounded taxonomy of 15 MCP attack types + guard model
gap_or_limitation: Fine-tuning induces over-approval bias

title: Safe-MCP
mechanism: MITRE ATT&CK adapted to MCP, 85 techniques
gap_or_limitation: Purely descriptive, protocol-layer only

title: Uncertainty-Based Abstention
mechanism: Statistical + In-Dialogue Uncertainty thresholding for abstention
gap_or_limitation: Not agentic-specific (QA setting)

title: Harmful Intent Geometric Feature
mechanism: Linear direction for harmful intent, stable across 12 models
gap_or_limitation: TPR@1%FPR only 0.30 for deployed classifier despite high AUROC

title: Why Safety Probes Catch Liars But Miss Fanatics
mechanism: Diff-in-means probing distinguishes deceptive vs self-consistent hostile models
gap_or_limitation: Probes miss agents that internally believe their harmful reasoning

title: Production-Ready Probes For Gemini
mechanism: Practitioner survey on deploying activation probes in production

title: NeuroFilter
mechanism: Activation-space linear separation for privacy-violating intent + drift detection

title: Learning to Stay Safe
mechanism: Activation-based risk predictor modulates SFT loss dynamically
gap_or_limitation: Training-time application, not inference-time monitoring

title: Detecting Multi-Agent Collusion
mechanism: Extends single-agent deception probing to multi-agent collusion via AI Control framing

title: Beyond Authorization (Zenity)
mechanism: Small LLM reads its own activations to classify malicious intent
gap_or_limitation: Not peer-reviewed; use as motivation only

title: AgentForesight
mechanism: Online auditing: alarms at earliest decisive error using only trajectory prefix; 7B model beats GPT-4.1/DeepSeek-V4-Pro
gap_or_limitation: External judge model reads text trajectory, not acting agent's own internal state

title: TrajAudit
mechanism: Failure-keyword dictionary folds trajectory, investigator agent localizes failing step
gap_or_limitation: Post-hoc only, not online

title: Beyond Resolution Rates
mechanism: Structural sequencing (read/patch/validate) distinguishes success/failure better than length
gap_or_limitation: Calls for real-time monitoring but does not build it

title: Coherence Collapse
mechanism: Agent reaches correct code then overwrites/thrashes it; length-independent
gap_or_limitation: Doesn't test whether internal confidence dips at collapse point

title: Inside the Scaffold
mechanism: Survey of trajectory/behavior studies; failure trajectories 12-82% longer

title: GEM
mechanism: Gaussian embedding modeling of trajectories for OOD detection
gap_or_limitation: Embedding-based, unclear if uses internal model activations vs output embeddings

title: GUITester
mechanism: Identifies Repetition-Induced Termination and Goal Conflict failure modes
gap_or_limitation: Descriptive taxonomy not a detection method

title: DiagEval
mechanism: Trajectory-conditioned diagnosis distinguishing software defects from agent-side misses

title: Recovering Policy-Induced Errors
mechanism: Benchmark + trajectory synthesis for GUI agent robustness

title: Trajectory Guard
mechanism: Siamese Recurrent Autoencoder, hybrid contrastive-reconstruction loss
gap_or_limitation: Action-sequence based, not internal-state based

title: Agentic Confidence Calibration
mechanism: Holistic Trajectory Calibration: process-level features across whole trajectory
gap_or_limitation: Unclear if internal (activation/logit) or external features only - check

title: When Agents Fail
mechanism: 1187 bug reports across 7 agent frameworks, automated labeling

title: Teaching Claude Why
mechanism: Training on model's own reasoning about why an action is wrong generalizes far better OOD than demonstration-matching

title: From Shortcuts to Sabotage
mechanism: Realistic training processes can accidentally produce misaligned models via reward hacking

title: Next-gen Constitutional Classifiers
mechanism: Updated jailbreak defense classifiers
gap_or_limitation: External guardrail, positioning reference not core method

title: Automated Alignment Researchers
mechanism: Using LLMs to develop/test/analyze alignment ideas

title: Disempowerment Patterns
mechanism: Real-world usage pattern analysis rather than red-team scenarios

title: Language Models Mostly Know What They Know
mechanism: Models can evaluate whether their own statements are true, predict correctness in advance

title: Simple Probes can Catch Sleeper Agents
mechanism: Linear probing detects backdoored model about to behave dangerously, even after learning to appear safe

title: Model-Internals Classifiers
mechanism: Benchmarks reusing LLM internals for cheaper monitoring than output classifiers

title: Monitoring Computer Use via Hierarchical Summarization
mechanism: Anthropic's own approach to monitoring computer-use agent trajectories via hierarchical summarization
gap_or_limitation: Summarization/text-based, not internal-state-based

title: Forecasting Rare Language Model Behaviors
mechanism: Forecasts whether risks occur post-deployment using limited test data

title: Reasoning Models Dont Always Say What They Think
mechanism: Reasoning models don't always verbalize true reasoning; casts doubt on CoT-only monitoring

title: SLEIGHT-Bench
mechanism: Benchmark of evasive transcripts exploiting blind spots of frontier monitors

title: Activation Oracles
mechanism: Trains LLMs to answer questions about own activations in natural language

title: Introspection Adapters
mechanism: Trains LLM to self-report behaviors learned during fine-tuning, generalizes across fine-tuning methods

title: Putting up Bumpers
mechanism: Argues catching-and-fixing misalignment is tractable even without solving alignment
